---

## Overview

> A proprietary machine learning / ai system comprising 8789 integrated source modules.

**Pandi GPT** is an advanced machine learning / ai system engineered by **Karthik Idikuda**. Built with Express.js.

<br/>

## System Architecture

```mermaid
graph TD;
    A["Raw Data Input"] -->|"Ingest"| B["Preprocessing Pipeline"];
    B -->|"Clean Tensors"| D{"Neural Net Engine"};
    D -->|"Training Loop"| E["Inference & Prediction"];
    E -->|"Metrics"| F["Evaluation & Output"];

    style A fill:#1a0f00,stroke:#ffa657,stroke-width:2px,color:#fff
    style B fill:#2d1a00,stroke:#ffa657,stroke-width:1px,color:#fff
    style D fill:#1a0f00,stroke:#ffa657,stroke-width:3px,color:#fff
    style E fill:#2d1a00,stroke:#ffa657,stroke-width:1px,color:#fff
    style F fill:#452800,stroke:#ffa657,stroke-width:2px,color:#fff
```

<br/>

## Project Structure

```
Pandi-GPT/
  .env
  .gitignore
  LICENSE
  README.md
  netlify.toml
  .github/
  .vs/
    VSWorkspaceState.json
    slnx.sqlite
  client/
    .gitignore
    README.md
    package-lock.json
    package.json
  node_modules/
    .package-lock.json
  server/
```

<br/>

## Technical Specifications

| Attribute | Detail |
|:---|:---|
| **Primary Language** | `JavaScript` |
| **Project Category** | `Machine Learning / AI` |
| **Total Source Files** | `8789` |
| **Frameworks** | `Express.js` |
| **IP Status** | `Strictly Proprietary` |

## Dependencies

<p align="left">
  <code>axios</code>  <code>express</code>  <code>concurrently</code>  <code>body-parser</code>  <code>dotenv</code>
</p>
